description_long: This chaise features a minimalist, modern design with a rectangular base and two large, plush backrest cushions. The upholstery is a smooth, solid gray fabric that covers both the seat and the cushions, giving it a sleek and uniform appearance. The seat is thick and appears well-padded, providing ample comfort for lounging. The backrest is straight and slightly elevated, with two separate cushions that are evenly spaced and slightly angled for ergonomic support. There are no visible armrests or legs, as the base extends directly to the floor, creating a low-profile silhouette. The overall look is contemporary and versatile, suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or residential outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, low-profile chaise with a solid gray fabric, thick seat, and two large backrest cushions. It has a sleek, minimalist design with no visible armrests or legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat and two large, evenly spaced backrest cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick seat cushion and the straight, upright backrest with no armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the chaise, showing the full width and the backs of the two cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, emphasizing the seat depth and cushion thickness.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of two large, rectangular cushions that are straight and slightly elevated, providing a clean and modern look. There are no visible decorative elements or tufting, and the cushions are evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base of the chaise extends directly to the floor, creating a solid, block-like appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, loose backrest cushions placed side by side along the back edge of the seat. The seat itself is a single, thick cushion integrated into the base.
